messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Image elements must have an alt prop, either with meaningful text, or an empty string for decorative images.

source:
"use client"

import { useState } from "react"
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs"
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea"
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select"
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger } from "@/components/ui/collapsible"
import { toast } from "sonner"
import {
    HelpCircle, BookOpen, MessagesSquare, Phone, Shield,
    CheckCircle, Upload, Users, Settings as SettingsIcon, Play,
    ChevronDown, ChevronRight, FileText, Download, AlertCircle,
    Mail, Paperclip, CheckCircle2, XCircle, Clock, Zap, Image
} from "lucide-react"

export default function HelpPage() {
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("getting-started")
    const [openGuide, setOpenGuide] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [openFaq, setOpenFaq] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [openDoc, setOpenDoc] = useState<string | null>(null)
    const [checklist, setChecklist] = useState({
        upload: false,
        workflow: false,
        team: false,
        security: false
    })

    // Support form state
    const [supportForm, setSupportForm] = useState({
        subject: "",
        category: "General",
        message: ""
    })

    // Product guides
    const guides = [
        {
            id: "assistant",
            title: "How to use the Assistant",
            description: "Learn how to chat with AI and get legal insights",
            steps: [
                "Open the Assistant from the sidebar",
                "Type your legal query in the chat box",
                "Review AI-generated responses with citations",
                "Ask follow-up questions to refine answers",
                "Export conversation for your records"
            ],
            tips: [
                "Be specific in your queries for better results",
                "Always verify AI responses against primary sources",
                "Use clear legal terminology for accurate answers"
            ]
        },
        {
            id: "workflows",
            title: "How Workflows work",
            description: "Automate complex legal tasks with workflows",
            steps: [
                "Navigate to the Workflows section",
                "Select a workflow template (e.g., Redline Analysis)",
                "Upload required documents",
                "Configure workflow parameters",
                "Review and download results"
            ],
            tips: [
                "Choose the right workflow for your task",
                "Ensure documents are in supported formats",
                "Review outputs carefully before using in legal work"
            ]
        },
        {
            id: "vault",
            title: "How Vault works",
            description: "Organize and analyze your legal documents",
            steps: [
                "Create a new project in Vault",
                "Upload documents (PDF, DOCX, etc.)",
                "Use AI to analyze and summarize documents",
                "Tag and organize for easy retrieval",
                "Share with team members as needed"
            ],
            tips: [
                "Use descriptive project names",
                "Organize by client or matter type",
                "Regularly review and archive old projects"
            ]
        },
        {
            id: "drafting",
            title: "How to draft documents",
            description: "Create legal documents with AI assistance",
            steps: [
                "Select a document template or start from scratch",
                "Provide context and requirements to the AI",
                "Review and edit the AI-generated draft",
                "Add specific clauses or terms as needed",
                "Export in your preferred format"
            ],
            tips: [
                "Provide detailed context for better results",
                "Always review and customize AI drafts",
                "Maintain your firm's style and preferences"
            ]
        },
        {
            id: "contracts",
            title: "How to review contracts",
            description: "Efficiently analyze and redline contracts",
            steps: [
                "Upload the contract to review",
                "Use AI to identify key clauses and risks",
                "Compare against standard playbooks",
                "Generate redlines and comments",
                "Export marked-up version"
            ],
            tips: [
                "Set up custom playbooks for your practice",
                "Review all AI-suggested changes",
                "Track changes for audit purposes"
            ]
        },
        {
            id: "team",
            title: "How to manage your team",
            description: "Collaborate effectively with team members",
            steps: [
                "Go to Settings > Team",
                "Invite members via email",
                "Assign appropriate roles (Admin, Lawyer, Paralegal)",
                "Share projects and conversations",
                "Monitor team activity in audit logs"
            ],
            tips: [
                "Set clear role permissions",
                "Regularly review team access",
                "Use audit logs for compliance"
            ]
        }
    ]

    // FAQs
    const faqs = [
        {
            id: "privacy",
            question: "Is my data private?",
            answer: "Yes. All your data is encrypted end-to-end using AES-256 encryption. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Your data is never used to train AI models without explicit consent, and we maintain strict access controls. Only authorized personnel can access encrypted data for support purposes, and all access is logged for audit."
        },
        {
            id: "lawyer",
            question: "Does this replace a lawyer?",
            answer: "No. Legal AI is designed to assist legal professionals, not replace them. It helps with research, drafting, and analysis, but all outputs must be reviewed and verified by qualified attorneys. The technology augments human expertise rather than substituting professional judgment. You remain responsible for all legal work product."
        },
        {
            id: "export",
            question: "Can I export my data?",
            answer: "Yes. You can export all your data at any time from Settings > Data & Privacy. Exports include conversations, documents, projects, and metadata in JSON format. We provide tools to download individual conversations, projects, or complete account data. There are no fees or restrictions on data export."
        },
        {
            id: "accuracy",
            question: "How accurate is the AI?",
            answer: "Our AI is trained on vast legal datasets and achieves high accuracy, but it's not infallible. Always verify AI-generated content against primary sources. The AI provides citations for fact-checking. Accuracy varies by jurisdiction and practice area. We continuously improve models based on feedback and new legal developments."
        },
        {
            id: "team-privacy",
            question: "Can my team see my chats?",
            answer: "By default, conversations are private to you unless explicitly shared. Admins can access team data for compliance purposes if audit logs are enabled. You can share specific conversations or projects with team members. Review your privacy settings in Settings > Data & Privacy to configure sharing preferences."
        },
        {
            id: "soc2",
            question: "Is this SOC 2 compliant?",
            answer: "Yes. We are SOC 2 Type II certified, meaning we've undergone rigorous third-party audits of our security controls. We also maintain ISO 27001 certification and are GDPR compliant. Regular penetration testing and security audits ensure ongoing compliance. Compliance reports are available to enterprise customers."
        },
        {
            id: "storage",
            question: "How is data stored?",
            answer: "Data is stored in enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with multiple redundancies. All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We use geographically distributed data centers for reliability and performance. Regular backups ensure data durability. You can specify data residency requirements for enterprise plans."
        },
        {
            id: "jurisdictions",
            question: "What jurisdictions are supported?",
            answer: "We currently support US, UK, EU, and Indian jurisdictions with specialized models for each. Our AI is trained on jurisdiction-specific legal corpora including case law, statutes, and regulations. We're continuously expanding to additional jurisdictions. Contact sales for specific jurisdiction requirements or custom training."
        }
    ]

    // Legal docs
    const legalDocs = [
        {
            id: "terms",
            title: "Terms of Service",
            content: "TERMS OF SERVICE

Last Updated: January 25, 2026

1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS

By accessing and using Legal AI (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the Service.

2. DESCRIPTION OF SERVICE

Legal AI provides artificial intelligence-powered legal research, document analysis, and drafting assistance to legal professionals and organizations.

3. USER OBLIGATIONS

You agree to:
- Provide accurate registration information
- Maintain the security of your account
- Use the Service in compliance with applicable laws
- Verify all AI-generated content before professional use
- Not misuse or attempt to compromise the Service

4. PROFESSIONAL RESPONSIBILITY

You acknowledge that Legal AI is an assistive tool and does not constitute legal advice. You remain solely responsible for all professional work product and legal obligations.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

You retain ownership of your data. We retain ownership of the Service and underlying technology. You grant us a limited license to process your data to provide the Service.

6. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

The Service is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from use of the Service, including but not limited to professional errors, data loss, or service interruptions.

7. TERMINATION

We may terminate or suspend access for violations of these terms. You may terminate your account at any time through Settings."
        },
        {
            id: "privacy",
            title: "Privacy Policy",
            content: "PRIVACY POLICY

Last Updated: January 25, 2026

1. INFORMATION WE COLLECT

We collect:
- Account information (name, email, organization)
- Usage data (features used, documents processed)
- Technical data (IP address, browser, device)
- Content you provide (chats, documents, projects)

2. HOW WE USE YOUR DATA

We use your data to:
- Provide and improve the Service
- Personalize your experience
- Ensure security and prevent fraud
- Comply with legal obligations
- Communicate service updates

We do NOT use your content to train AI models without explicit consent.

3. DATA SHARING

We do not sell your data. We may share data with:
- Service providers (cloud hosting, analytics)
- Legal authorities when required by law
- Your organization's administrators

4. DATA SECURITY

We implement industry-standard security measures including:
- AES-256 encryption at rest
- TLS 1.3 encryption in transit
- Regular security audits
- Access controls and monitoring
- SOC 2 Type II compliance

5. YOUR RIGHTS

You have the right to:
- Access your data
- Export your data
- Delete your data
- Opt out of certain data uses
- File complaints with data protection authorities

6. DATA RETENTION

We retain data for as long as your account is active plus any legally required retention period. You can configure auto-deletion in Settings.

7. INTERNATIONAL TRANSFERS

Data may be processed in multiple jurisdictions. We implement appropriate safeguards for international data transfers in compliance with GDPR and other regulations.

8. CONTACT

For privacy questions: privacy@legalai.com"
        },
        {
            id: "security",
            title: "Security Overview",
            content: "SECURITY OVERVIEW

Legal AI Security Commitments

1. CERTIFICATIONS & COMPLIANCE

- SOC 2 Type II Certified
- ISO 27001:2013 Certified
- GDPR Compliant
- CCPA Compliant
- Regular third-party security audits

2. DATA ENCRYPTION

- At Rest: AES-256 encryption for all stored data
- In Transit: TLS 1.3 for all network communications
- Key Management: Hardware Security Modules (HSM)
- Database Encryption: Field-level encryption for sensitive data

3. ACCESS CONTROLS

- Multi-factor authentication (MFA) required
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Principle of least privilege
- Regular access reviews
- Session management and timeouts

4. INFRASTRUCTURE SECURITY

- Private cloud with network isolation
- DDoS protection
- Intrusion detection systems (IDS)
- Web application firewall (WAF)
- Regular vulnerability scanning
- Penetration testing (quarterly)

5. APPLICATION SECURITY

- Secure development lifecycle (SDL)
- Code review and static analysis
- Dependency scanning and updates
- Input validation and sanitization
- OWASP Top 10 mitigation

6. MONITORING & INCIDENT RESPONSE

- 24/7 security monitoring
- Automated threat detection
- Incident response plan
- Defined escalation procedures
- Regular security drills

7. AUDIT LOGS

- Comprehensive activity logging
- Tamper-proof log storage
- Log retention per compliance requirements
- Available for customer review

8. BUSINESS CONTINUITY

- 99.9% uptime SLA
- Automated backups (hourly)
- Disaster recovery plan
- Redundant infrastructure
- Regular DR testing

9. EMPLOYEE SECURITY

- Background checks
- Security awareness training
- Confidentiality agreements
- Limited production access
- Audit of admin actions

For security questions: security@legalai.com
For vulnerability reports: security@legalai.com"
        },
        {
            id: "responsible-ai",
            title: "Responsible AI Policy",
            content: "RESPONSIBLE AI POLICY

Our Commitment to Ethical AI

1. TRANSPARENCY

We are transparent about:
- How our AI works
- Limitations and potential biases
- Training data sources
- Confidence levels in outputs
- When AI vs. human is involved

2. ACCURACY & RELIABILITY

- Regular model evaluation and testing
- Human review of training data
- Mitigation of known biases
- Citation and source tracking
- Continuous improvement based on feedback

3. FAIRNESS & NON-DISCRIMINATION

- Training data diversity
- Bias detection and mitigation
- Regular fairness audits
- Inclusive design principles
- Accessibility compliance

4. PRIVACY & SECURITY

- No training on customer data without consent
- Anonymization of training data
- Secure model deployment
- Data minimization
- Privacy by design

5. ACCOUNTABILITY

- Clear ownership and governance
- Defined escalation paths
- Impact assessments for new features
- External audits and reviews
- Transparent reporting of issues

6. HUMAN OVERSIGHT

- AI assists, humans decide
- Critical decisions require human review
- User control over AI suggestions
- Easy opt-out mechanisms
- Human-in-the-loop workflows

7. LEGAL & ETHICAL COMPLIANCE

- Adherence to AI regulations
- Ethical review board
- Legal team oversight
- Industry best practices
- Ongoing training and updates

8. USER EMPOWERMENT

- Clear documentation and guidance
- Education on AI limitations
- Tools for verification
- Feedback mechanisms
- User control over AI use

9. CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT

- Regular model updates
- Feedback incorporation
- Research into AI safety
- Industry collaboration
- Public reporting on AI performance

10. PROHIBITED USES

We prohibit use of our AI for:
- Making final legal decisions without human review
- Generating misleading or false information
- Discriminatory purposes
- Unauthorized practice of law
- Violation of professional ethics

Contact: ai-ethics@legalai.com"
        },
        {
            id: "dpa",
            title: "Data Processing Addendum (DPA)",
            content: "DATA PROCESSING ADDENDUM

This Data Processing Addendum ("DPA") forms part of the Terms of Service between you ("Customer") and Legal AI ("Processor").

1. DEFINITIONS

- Personal Data: Any information relating to an identified or identifiable person
- Processing: Any operation performed on Personal Data
- Controller: The entity that determines purposes and means of Processing
- Processor: The entity that Processes Personal Data on behalf of Controller
- Sub-processor: A third party engaged by Processor

2. SCOPE OF PROCESSING

Processor will Process Personal Data as necessary to provide the Service, including:
- Storing and retrieving data
- Analyzing data for Service functionality
- Generating AI responses
- Providing support

3. PROCESSOR OBLIGATIONS

Processor shall:
- Process Personal Data only per Customer's instructions
- Ensure confidentiality of Personal Data
- Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures
- Assist with Data Subject requests
- Notify Customer of data breaches within 72 hours
- Delete or return Personal Data upon termination

4. SUB-PROCESSORS

Current Sub-processors:
- Cloud Infrastructure: AWS, Microsoft Azure
- Analytics: Analytics Provider (anonymized)
- Email: Email Service Provider

Customer authorizes use of Sub-processors. Processor will notify Customer of Sub-processor changes with 30 days notice.

5. SECURITY MEASURES

Processor implements:
- Encryption (AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit)
- Access controls (MFA, RBAC)
- Regular security audits
- Incident response procedures
- SOC 2 Type II compliance

6. DATA SUBJECT RIGHTS

Processor will assist Customer with:
- Access requests
- Rectification requests
- Erasure requests
- Data portability
- Restriction of processing
- Objection to processing

7. DATA BREACH NOTIFICATION

In case of a Personal Data breach, Processor will:
- Notify Customer within 72 hours
- Provide details of the breach
- Describe mitigation measures
- Cooperate with investigation
- Implement corrective actions

8. DATA TRANSFERS

For transfers outside the EEA:
- Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) apply
- Privacy Shield Framework (where applicable)
- Adequate safeguards per GDPR Article 46

9. AUDIT RIGHTS

Customer may audit Processor's compliance through:
- Review of SOC 2 reports
- Security questionnaires
- On-site audits (with reasonable notice)

10. LIABILITY

Processor's liability is limited per the Terms of Service, except for violations of data protection laws where no limitation applies.

11. TERM & TERMINATION

This DPA remains in effect for the duration of the Service agreement. Upon termination, Processor will delete or return all Personal Data within 30 days unless legally required to retain.

Contact: dpo@legalai.com"
        }
    ]



    const handleChecklistToggle = (item: keyof typeof checklist) => {
        setChecklist({ ...checklist, [item]: !checklist[item] })
    }

    const handleSupportSubmit = () => {
        if (!supportForm.subject || !supportForm.message) {
            toast.error("Please fill in all required fields")
            return
        }
        toast.success("Support ticket submitted successfully! We'll respond within 24 hours.")
        setSupportForm({ subject: "", category: "General", message: "" })
    }

    const handleProductTour = () => {
        toast.info("Product tour coming soon! Check back later.")
    }

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col flex-1 w-full max-w-[1400px] mx-auto p-3 sm:p-4 md:p-6 space-y-4 md:space-y-6 h-full overflow-y-auto">
            {/* Header */}
            <div className="space-y-2">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-primary/10">
                        <HelpCircle className="h-6 w-6 text-primary" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold">Help Center</h1>
                        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Get help and learn about Legal AI</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <Separator />

            {/* Tabs */}
            <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="w-full">
                <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 h-auto">
                    <TabsTrigger value="getting-started" className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs sm:text-sm">
                        <Zap className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span className="hidden sm:inline">Getting Started</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger value="guides" className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs sm:text-sm">
                        <BookOpen className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span className="hidden sm:inline">Product Guides</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger value="faq" className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs sm:text-sm">
                        <MessagesSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span className="hidden sm:inline">FAQ</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger value="support" className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs sm:text-sm">
                        <Phone className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span className="hidden sm:inline">Contact Support</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger value="legal" className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs sm:text-sm">
                        <Shield className="h-4 w-4" />
                        <span className="hidden sm:inline">Legal & Compliance</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                </TabsList>

                {/* GETTING STARTED TAB */}
                <TabsContent value="getting-started" className="space-y-4 mt-6">
                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Welcome to Legal AI</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Complete these steps to get started with the platform</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                            <div className="space-y-3">
                                <div
                                    className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                                    onClick={() => handleChecklistToggle("upload")}
                                >
                                    <div className="mt-0.5">
                                        {checklist.upload ? (
                                            <CheckCircle2 className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
                                        ) : (
                                            <div className="h-5 w-5 rounded-full border-2 border-muted-foreground" />
                                        )}
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="font-medium">Upload your first document</div>
                                        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                                            Go to Vault and upload a legal document to get started with AI analysis
                                        </p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div
                                    className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                                    onClick={() => handleChecklistToggle("workflow")}
                                >
                                    <div className="mt-0.5">
                                        {checklist.workflow ? (
                                            <CheckCircle2 className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
                                        ) : (
                                            <div className="h-5 w-5 rounded-full border-2 border-muted-foreground" />
                                        )}
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="font-medium">Run your first workflow</div>
                                        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                                            Try a workflow like Redline Analysis or Company Profile to see AI in action
                                        </p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div
                                    className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                                    onClick={() => handleChecklistToggle("team")}
                                >
                                    <div className="mt-0.5">
                                        {checklist.team ? (
                                            <CheckCircle2 className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
                                        ) : (
                                            <div className="h-5 w-5 rounded-full border-2 border-muted-foreground" />
                                        )}
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="font-medium">Invite your team</div>
                                        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                                            Add team members from Settings → Team to collaborate on projects
                                        </p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div
                                    className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                                    onClick={() => handleChecklistToggle("security")}
                                >
                                    <div className="mt-0.5">
                                        {checklist.security ? (
                                            <CheckCircle2 className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
                                        ) : (
                                            <div className="h-5 w-5 rounded-full border-2 border-muted-foreground" />
                                        )}
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="font-medium">Review security settings</div>
                                        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                                            Enable 2FA and review privacy settings in Settings → Security
                                        </p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <Separator />

                            <div className="flex gap-3">
                                <Button onClick={handleProductTour} className="flex-1 sm:flex-none">
                                    <Play className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                                    Start Product Tour
                                </Button>
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>

                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Introduction Video</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Watch a quick tour of Legal AI</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent>
                            <div className="aspect-video bg-muted rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                                <div className="text-center space-y-2">
                                    <Image className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />
                                    <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Video tutorial coming soon</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                </TabsContent>

                {/* PRODUCT GUIDES TAB */}
                <TabsContent value="guides" className="space-y-4 mt-6">
                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Product Guides</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Step-by-step guides for using Legal AI</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                {guides.map((guide) => (
                                    <Dialog key={guide.id} open={openGuide === guide.id} onOpenChange={(open) => setOpenGuide(open ? guide.id : null)}>
                                        <DialogTrigger asChild>
                                            <Card className="cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors">
                                                <CardContent className="pt-6">
                                                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                                                        <BookOpen className="h-5 w-5 text-primary mt-0.5" />
                                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                                            <h4 className="font-semibold mb-1">{guide.title}</h4>
                                                            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{guide.description}</p>
                                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2 text-xs text-primary">
                                                                <span>Read guide</span>
                                                                <ChevronRight className="h-3 w-3" />
                                                            </div>
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </CardContent>
                                            </Card>
                                        </DialogTrigger>
                                        <DialogContent className="max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto">
                                            <DialogHeader>
                                                <DialogTitle>{guide.title}</DialogTitle>
                                                <DialogDescription>{guide.description}</DialogDescription>
                                            </DialogHeader>
                                            <div className="space-y-4 py-4">
                                                <div>
                                                    <h4 className="font-semibold mb-3">Steps:</h4>
                                                    <ol className="space-y-2">
                                                        {guide.steps.map((step, index) => (
                                                            <li key={index} className="flex gap-3">
                                                                <span className="flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center h-6 w-6 rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-primary text-sm font-medium">
                                                                    {index + 1}
                                                                </span>
                                                                <span className="text-sm pt-0.5">{step}</span>
                                                            </li>
                                                        ))}
                                                    </ol>
                                                </div>

                                                <div className="bg-muted/50 rounded-lg p-4">
                                                    <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                                                        <FileText className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground mt-0.5" />
                                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                                            <div className="text-sm font-medium mb-1">Screenshot Placeholder</div>
                                                            <div className="aspect-video bg-muted rounded border flex items-center justify-center">
                                                                <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Visual guide coming soon</span>
                                                            </div>
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>

                                                <div className="border-l-4 border-primary/50 bg-primary/5 p-4 rounded">
                                                    <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                                                        <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4" />
                                                        Tips & Best Practices
                                                    </h4>
                                                    <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm">
                                                        {guide.tips.map((tip, index) => (
                                                            <li key={index} className="flex gap-2">
                                                                <span>•</span>
                                                                <span>{tip}</span>
                                                            </li>
                                                        ))}
                                                    </ul>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </DialogContent>
                                    </Dialog>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                </TabsContent>

                {/* FAQ TAB */}
                <TabsContent value="faq" className="space-y-4 mt-6">
                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Frequently Asked Questions</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Find answers to common questions about Legal AI</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent>
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                {faqs.map((faq) => (
                                    <Collapsible key={faq.id} open={openFaq === faq.id} onOpenChange={(open) => setOpenFaq(open ? faq.id : null)}>
                                        <CollapsibleTrigger className="flex items-center justify-between w-full p-4 rounded-lg border hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
                                            <span className="font-medium text-left">{faq.question}</span>
                                            {openFaq === faq.id ? (
                                                <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 ml-2" />
                                            ) : (
                                                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 ml-2" />
                                            )}
                                        </CollapsibleTrigger>
                                        <CollapsibleContent className="px-4 pt-2 pb-4">
                                            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">{faq.answer}</p>
                                        </CollapsibleContent>
                                    </Collapsible>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                </TabsContent>

                {/* CONTACT SUPPORT TAB */}
                <TabsContent value="support" className="space-y-4 mt-6">
                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Contact Support</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Submit a support ticket and we'll get back to you within 24 hours</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <Label htmlFor="subject">Subject *</Label>
                                <Input
                                    id="subject"
                                    placeholder="Brief description of your issue"
                                    value={supportForm.subject}
                                    onChange={(e) => setSupportForm({ ...supportForm, subject: e.target.value })}
                                />
                            </div>

                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <Label htmlFor="category">Category *</Label>
                                <Select value={supportForm.category} onValueChange={(v) => setSupportForm({ ...supportForm, category: v })}>
                                    <SelectTrigger>
                                        <SelectValue />
                                    </SelectTrigger>
                                    <SelectContent>
                                        <SelectItem value="General">General Question</SelectItem>
                                        <SelectItem value="Bug">Bug Report</SelectItem>
                                        <SelectItem value="Feature">Feature Request</SelectItem>
                                        <SelectItem value="Billing">Billing</SelectItem>
                                        <SelectItem value="Security">Security</SelectItem>
                                    </SelectContent>
                                </Select>
                            </div>

                            <div className="space-y-2">
                                <Label htmlFor="message">Message *</Label>
                                <Textarea
                                    id="message"
                                    placeholder="Describe your issue in detail..."
                                    rows={6}
                                    value={supportForm.message}
                                    onChange={(e) => setSupportForm({ ...supportForm, message: e.target.value })}
                                />
                            </div>

                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border bg-muted/30">
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                                    <Paperclip className="h-4 w-4" />
                                    <span>Attach files</span>
                                </div>
                                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => toast.info("File attachments coming soon")}>
                                    Browse
                                </Button>
                            </div>

                            <Separator />

                            <div className="flex gap-3">
                                <Button onClick={handleSupportSubmit} className="flex-1 sm:flex-none">
                                    <Mail className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                                    Submit Ticket
                                </Button>
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>

                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Other Contact Options</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Additional ways to reach our support team</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent className="space-y-3">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border">
                                <div>
                                    <div className="font-medium">Email Support</div>
                                    <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">support@legalai.com</div>
                                </div>
                                <Mail className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                            </div>

                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border bg-muted/30">
                                <div>
                                    <div className="font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
                                        Live Chat
                                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">Coming Soon</Badge>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Real-time chat support</div>
                                </div>
                                <MessagesSquare className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                            </div>

                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border">
                                <div>
                                    <div className="font-medium">Response Time</div>
                                    <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">24 hours for most inquiries</div>
                                </div>
                                <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                </TabsContent>

                {/* LEGAL & COMPLIANCE TAB */}
                <TabsContent value="legal" className="space-y-4 mt-6">
                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Legal & Compliance Documents</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Review our legal policies and compliance information</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                {legalDocs.map((doc) => (
                                    <Dialog key={doc.id} open={openDoc === doc.id} onOpenChange={(open) => setOpenDoc(open ? doc.id : null)}>
                                        <DialogTrigger asChild>
                                            <Card className="cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors">
                                                <CardContent className="pt-6">
                                                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                                                        <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-primary mt-0.5" />
                                                        <div className="flex-1">
                                                            <h4 className="font-semibold mb-1">{doc.title}</h4>
                                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-2 text-xs text-primary">
                                                                <span>View document</span>
                                                                <ChevronRight className="h-3 w-3" />
                                                            </div>
                                                        </div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </CardContent>
                                            </Card>
                                        </DialogTrigger>
                                        <DialogContent className="max-w-3xl max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto">
                                            <DialogHeader>
                                                <DialogTitle>{doc.title}</DialogTitle>
                                                <DialogDescription>
                                                    <Button
                                                        variant="ghost"
                                                        size="sm"
                                                        className="mt-2"
                                                        onClick={() => {
                                                            navigator.clipboard.writeText(doc.content)
                                                            toast.success("Document copied to clipboard")
                                                        }}
                                                    >
                                                        <Download className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                                                        Copy to Clipboard
                                                    </Button>
                                                </DialogDescription>
                                            </DialogHeader>
                                            <div className="py-4">
                                                <div className="p-4 bg-muted/30 rounded-lg border font-mono text-xs whitespace-pre-wrap max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto">
                                                    {doc.content}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </DialogContent>
                                    </Dialog>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>

                    <Card>
                        <CardHeader>
                            <CardTitle>Compliance Certifications</CardTitle>
                            <CardDescription>Our security and compliance standards</CardDescription>
                        </CardHeader>
                        <CardContent>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                                <div className="p-4 rounded-lg border text-center">
                                    <Shield className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
                                    <div className="font-semibold text-sm">SOC 2 Type II</div>
                                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Certified</div>
                                </div>
                                <div className="p-4 rounded-lg border text-center">
                                    <Shield className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
                                    <div className="font-semibold text-sm">ISO 27001</div>
                                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Certified</div>
                                </div>
                                <div className="p-4 rounded-lg border text-center">
                                    <Shield className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
                                    <div className="font-semibold text-sm">GDPR</div>
                                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Compliant</div>
                                </div>
                                <div className="p-4 rounded-lg border text-center">
                                    <Shield className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 text-primary" />
                                    <div className="font-semibold text-sm">CCPA</div>
                                    <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Compliant</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </CardContent>
                    </Card>
                </TabsContent>


            </Tabs>
        </div >
    )
}

messages.message: 'setBilling' is assigned a value but never used.

source:
"use client" import { useState } from "react" import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input" import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch" import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select" import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Avatar, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar" import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog" import { toast } from "sonner" import { User, Building2, Users, Shield, Lock, Plug, CreditCard, Key, Trash2, Download, Upload, Plus, X, Check, AlertTriangle, Globe, Calendar, Mail, Phone, MapPin, FileText, Clock, BarChart, RefreshCw, LogOut, Settings as SettingsIcon, Eye, EyeOff } from "lucide-react" export default function SettingsPage() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("profile") // Profile state const [profile, setProfile] = useState({ fullName: "John Doe", email: "john.doe@lawfirm.com", role: "Admin", timezone: "America/New_York", language: "English", twoFactorEnabled: true }) // Organization state const [org, setOrg] = useState({ firmName: "Doe & Associates LLP", industry: "Law Firm", jurisdiction: "US", firmSize: "11-50", billingEmail: "billing@lawfirm.com" }) // Team state (fake data) const [team, setTeam] = useState([ { id: "1", name: "John Doe", email: "john@lawfirm.com", role: "Admin", status: "Active" }, { id: "2", name: "Jane Smith", email: "jane@lawfirm.com", role: "Lawyer", status: "Active" }, { id: "3", name: "Bob Johnson", email: "bob@lawfirm.com", role: "Paralegal", status: "Invited" } ]) const [inviteOpen, setInviteOpen] = useState(false) const [inviteEmail, setInviteEmail] = useState("") const [inviteRole, setInviteRole] = useState("Lawyer") // Privacy settings const [privacy, setPrivacy] = useState({ saveHistory: true, allowTraining: false, autoDeleteDays: "Never", auditLogs: true }) // Security settings const [security, setSecurity] = useState({ ipAllowlist: false }) // Fake sessions const [sessions, setSessions] = useState([ { id: "1", device: "Chrome on MacOS", location: "New York, US", lastActive: "Current session", ip: "192.168.1.1" }, { id: "2", device: "Safari on iPhone", location: "New York, US", lastActive: "2 hours ago", ip: "192.168.1.2" } ]) // Integrations (all coming soon) // Billing state const [billing, setBilling] = useState({ plan: "Enterprise Trial", seatsUsed: 3, seatsTotal: 10, billingCycle: "Monthly", nextBillingDate: "Feb 25, 2026" }) // Fake invoices const invoices = [ { id: "INV-001", date: "Jan 25, 2026", amount: "$0.00", status: "Trial", download: false }, { id: "INV-002", date: "Dec 25, 2025", amount: "$0.00", status: "Trial", download: false } ] // Handler functions const handleSaveProfile = () => { toast.success("Profile updated successfully") } const handleChangePassword = () => { toast.info("Password change link sent to your email") } const handleSaveOrganization = () => { toast.success("Organization settings saved") } const handleUploadLogo = () => { toast.info("Logo upload coming soon") } const handleInviteMember = () => { if (!inviteEmail) return setTeam([...team, { id: Date.now().toString(), name: "Invited User", email: inviteEmail, role: inviteRole, status: "Invited" }]) setInviteEmail("") setInviteOpen(false) toast.success(`Invitation sent to ${inviteEmail}`) } const handleRemoveMember = (id: string) => { setTeam(team.filter(m => m.id !== id)) toast.success("Team member removed") } const handleExportData = () => { toast.info("Preparing your data export... This may take a few minutes.") setTimeout(() => { toast.success("Data export complete! Download link sent to your email.") }, 2000) } const handleDeleteAllData = () => { toast.error("This action requires additional confirmation. Contact support to proceed.") } const handleLogoutAllSessions = () => { setSessions([sessions[0]]) // Keep only current session toast.success("All other sessions logged out") } const handleDownloadSecurityReport = () => { toast.info("Generating security report...") setTimeout(() => { toast.success("Security report downloaded!") }, 1500) } const handleUpgradePlan = () => { toast.info("Upgrading plan... Contact sales@legalai.com for enterprise pricing") } const handleCancelSubscription = () => { toast.error("To cancel your subscription, please contact support") } return (
{/* Header */}

Settings

{/* TEAM TAB */}

Member Role Status Actions

{/* DATA & PRIVACY TAB */} Data Collection Control how your data is used and stored

Download comprehensive security audit

"use client" import * as React from "react" import { usePathname, useRouter } from "next/navigation" import { BookOpen, History, LayoutGrid, Library, Settings, HelpCircle, Search, PanelLeft, ChevronRight, ChevronDown, User, CreditCard, LogOut, Badge, MessageSquarePlus } from "lucide-react" import { Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarHeader, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuSub, SidebarMenuSubItem, SidebarMenuSubButton, SidebarRail, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarGroupContent, } from "@/components/ui/sidebar" import { Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent, } from "@/components/ui/collapsible" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar" import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuGroup, } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu" import { toast } from "sonner" export function AppSidebar({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps) { const pathname = usePathname() const router = useRouter() return (

Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
